description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with the body and limbs unnaturally stretched and elongated into ribbon-like forms. The head and upper torso are relatively intact, showing a human face and partial arm, while the rest of the body extends into long, twisting, and tapering appendages. The legs are also elongated, with one foot visible and the other partially obscured by the stretched geometry. The figure appears to be wearing formal or business attire, including a collared shirt and dress shoes. The overall form is surreal and abstract, with the stretched portions creating sweeping curves and loops that dominate the object's silhouette.
description: A surreal, elongated adult pedestrian figure with a human head and torso, but body and limbs stretched into ribbon-like, twisting forms. The figure wears formal attire and dress shoes, with exaggerated, abstract geometry.
description_view_0: The head and upper torso are visible, with the body and limbs dramatically stretched into long, sweeping ribbons extending outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated neck and torso, with the head in profile and the legs stretched backward in a looping form.
description_view_2: Rear view shows the back of the head and the convergence of the stretched limbs, with the feet visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Another side view, emphasizing the twisting, ribbon-like extension of the body and the looping lower limbs.
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and distorted, with limbs and body extended in abstract forms
